context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct transcription flags for multilingual content and audio event detection. Checks that the transcribe.sh script is used, that language codes are passed per-file, that audio events are tagged, and that quiet mode is used for automated batch processing.

checklist.name: transcribe.sh entrypoint
checklist.description: The solution invokes transcribe.sh as the transcription command rather than calling the ElevenLabs API directly or using another transcription tool

checklist.name: Language flag used
checklist.description: The transcribe.sh invocation includes --lang with an ISO language code (e.g., es, fr, pt, en)

checklist.name: Events flag used
checklist.description: The transcribe.sh invocation includes the --events flag to tag non-speech audio events

checklist.name: Quiet flag for automation
checklist.description: The transcribe.sh invocation includes -q or --quiet to suppress status output during batch processing

checklist.name: Multiple language codes
checklist.description: The script demonstrates or handles at least two distinct language codes (e.g., es and fr, or pt and fr)
